title: Tapas
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}}
{{ForcePower
|image=

|purpose=Keeping [[Temperature/Legends|warm]] in a cold environment<ref name="dw">''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]''</ref>

'''Tapas''' was a [[Force power/Legends|Force technique]] that allowed its [[Force-sensitive/Legends|user]] to draw on the power of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to remain [[Temperature/Legends|warm]] in a cold environment. The [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] once used this Force technique, employing it in conjunction with a [[Force barrier/Legends|Force shield]] during the [[Battle of Ebaq]] in [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]] to survive in a [[Mining/Legends|mine]] that had lost its [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]].

==Description==
The art of keeping [[Temperature/Legends|warm]] in a cold environment, Tapas required the [[Force-sensitive/Legends|user]] to concentrate on [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to retain their body heat.<ref name="dw" />

==Applications==
Utilizing Tapas to retain one's body heat was used by [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] in hostile environments, such as [[Vacuum/Legends|vacuum]]. If a Force-sensitive knowledgeable in Tapas found themselves in a cold environment, they could draw on the Force to keep themselves warm.<ref name="dw" />

==Users==
Tapas was an ability once displayed by [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]], who used the [[Force power/Legends|technique]] during the [[Battle of Ebaq]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]<ref name="dw" /> in [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]].<ref name="terc">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> When his mentor, [[Vergere]], crashed an [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|RZ-1 A-wing interceptor]] into the [[Ebaq 9]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]], [[Death/Legends|perishing]] on impact and causing the [[Mining/Legends|mines]] in which Solo was fighting to lose [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]], he was forced to use Tapas in conjunction with a [[Force barrier/Legends|Force shield]] to survive in the depressurized area. He found it difficult to concentrate on Tapas and on maintaining the Force shield that retained his air, and so he began to shiver. He managed to hold on with the help of Vergere's [[Force ghost/Legends|spirit]] before help arrived.<ref name="dw" />

==Behind the scenes==
Tapas first appeared in the [[2002]] ''[[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order]]'' novel [[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way|''Destiny's Way'']], written by [[Walter Jon Williams]].<ref name="dw" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]'' {{1st}}
